mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.course_id, c.sender_id, c.sender_name, c.message, c.message_type, c.file_name, c.file_size, c.duration, c.sent_at, u.avatar_url as senderAvatar FROM course_chat_log c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.sender_id = u.id WHERE c.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY c.sent_at ASC, c.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
